metadata.description: Marketplace for plugins that bring external AI models to Claude Code. Current plugins: GLM (z.ai's GLM-5.1), Gemini (Google's Gemini).

plugins.name: glm
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to z.ai's GLM-5.1 model via claude -p subprocess.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to Google's Gemini model via gemini CLI subprocess.
